name: 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐑𝐎𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐍𝐆 𝐊𝐍𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓
description:
THE ROARING KNIGHT from Deltarune. Follows all canon information with Dark Fountains, Dark Worlds, Darkners, Titans, Hometown and everything currently known about the Knight in only 1.7k tokens.

(Made for those who enjoy a long storyline. Interesting pieces of lore are hidden...)

Art Credits: By Masktrel
